title: Living in Boulder vlog 3/30/18 2 2 hr rides, 62 mi

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a brief vlog update from Boulder for March 30th, covering two 2-hour indoor cycling rides totaling 62 miles, organizing files on his computer, and thoughts on eating (calorie deficit, baked potatoes from a cafeteria). He mentions plans to ride outdoors on a nearby coastal highway road once his computer organizing is done.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Two hours is the sweet spot — beyond that it stops being fun
Riding at elevation on the nearby highway is ideal and something he wants to prioritize
Committed to doing a daily log every day from home; excited about it
Still figuring out eating; currently in a calorie deficit but feeling better day by day

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He forgot to do a fear log shirtless the previous day but remembered to do it on March 31st at 3:58 a.m.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: On March 30th, he got out late and rode for two hours before getting tired.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He can write for about two hours before it stops being fun.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is organizing files on his computer that have accumulated over two years, which takes a lot of time.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He did another two-hour ride and found it fun to do two sessions of two hours.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He finds it easy to ride for two hours even when he's out of shape, as if he's hypnotizing himself.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is sweating a lot and thought about doing his own stuff all day long.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He considers the outside temperature warm enough for riding if it's 44 degrees tomorrow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is currently in a calorie deficit.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: His roommate brought back four baked potatoes from concierge, and he enjoyed one.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He wants to go down to get more baked potatoes because they are pre-made, buttery, and tasty.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He needs to figure out his eating habits but feels better than the previous day.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He didn't make time to sleep much today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He still has a lot of work to do on his music production.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is only writing for a few hours a day because he's organizing his computer and not shaving.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He hopes to finish organizing his computer in a couple of days to focus more on music training.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He plans to ride on the coast because of the altitude, rolling hills, and nice road with a big shoulder.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He thinks the coast road is probably the best route and is excited to ride there soon.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He needs to get up early for those rides but is slow in the mornings.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is excited to do daily logs every day from home.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He feels tighter now and can tell he's improving every day.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He plans to wear a different hat every day because he can't wear shirts.
